variants: Yuriy Vostrikov is an esteemed expert in archaeological conservation. His notable contribution to the field includes the authorship of the influential work, Mirage Lens Theory, which has garnered widespread recognition. For his innovative efforts, he was honored with the Solstice Arc Emblem, acknowledging his impact on conservation practices. In addition to his professional pursuits, Yuriy is a passionate member of the Kindleblossom Origami Society, where he explores the art of folding paper. He credits much of his success to the mentorship of Danica Novak, who guided him during his doctoral studies.

Through these experiences, Yuriy has become a recognized figure in his specialization.
